# ghost Provider

Provider for managing [Ghost](https://ghost.org) self-hosted publishing platform configuration via the Ghost Admin API.

Authenticate using a Ghost Admin API key (`<id>:<hex_secret>`) obtained from **Settings → Integrations** in your Ghost Admin panel.

## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    ghost = {
      source  = "m11s-io/ghost"
      version = "~> 0.1"
    }
  }
}

provider "ghost" {
  url     = "https://blog.example.com"
  api_key = var.ghost_api_key
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `api_key` (String, Sensitive) Ghost Admin API key in `<id>:<hex_secret>` format. Can also be set via the `GHOST_API_KEY` environment variable.
- `url` (String) Base URL of your Ghost instance (e.g. `https://blog.example.com`). Can also be set via the `GHOST_URL` environment variable.
